hooks.command: if echo "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT}" | grep -qE '(AGENTS\.md|CLAUDE\.md|settings\.json|package\.json|next\.config|Cargo\.toml|tsconfig|routes/index\.ts|app\.ts|middleware\.ts|layout\.tsx|panel-config\.ts)'; then echo '⏳ Structural change detected — consider running: ask Claude to regenerate AGENTS.md'; fi

cd /srv/samba/shared/EcliPanel/v3 && if git diff --name-only HEAD | grep -qE '(backend/src/(handlers|routes|services|middleware|types)/|frontend/app/layout|frontend/lib/panel-config|frontend/middleware|frontend/next.config|package\.json|Cargo\.toml|app\.ts)'; then echo ''; echo '⚠️  Structural code changes detected. AGENTS.md may be outdated.'; echo '   Ask Claude: "regenerate AGENTS.md based on recent changes"'; echo ''; fi
